name: Men's Shiny Plastic Shield Sunglasses - Original Use™ Black/Red: Scratch-Resistant, UV Protection
description:
Shield sunglasses with a shiny black plastic frame and colorful lenses. Offer maximum UV protection to keep eyes shielded from harmful sun rays, and designed with scratch-resistant properties for worry-free everyday use. Feature hinged temples for convenient folding and storage.

If you're not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.

Original Use™: Always the next evolution.
